name: Deletion of Data Structure Sentinel
description: The product accidentally removes a sentinel value (such as a null terminator or end-of-list marker) that marks the boundary of a data structure. This can cause the data structure to malfunction, leading to availability issues or authorization bypass.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM node modifies a STORAGE node containing sentinel-delimited data and removes the sentinel boundary marker without a CONTROL[sentinel_preservation] check ensuring the sentinel remains intact after modification.
